title: Random Hypothetical Gender Bender
wikitext:
[]: Random Hypothetical: Gender Bender?             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 23, 2008 11:53 am Just throwing this out there... would NGE still 'work' if all the charecters were of opposing genders, or would things be screwed up in entirely new ways by this role-reversal? How much would the story be different due to social views of gender issues? Just a couple examples of issues this might raise to get conversation started: If evas are male and powered by fathers' souls, does the umbilical/womb imagery need to be scraped entirely? Is it really the same situation when timid female Shinji moves in with hard-drinking male Misato who jokingly promises nothing will happen?

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Wed Jul 23, 2008 12:15 pm If the pilots father was in the eva, you'd just have just about every other giant robot show in existence. Its the pilots reaction to the evas soul, it is a cliche' that the hero is trying to live up to their fathers legacy. That is not exactly what would happen in this case, but the effect would be similar; I'm thinking of the scenes in the Lion King where Simba talks to his father from beyond the grave. You would get the good old "words of wisdom" type scene instead of, say, Asuka's epiphany when she discovers her mother inside Unit 02. Very different, ne? Psychological elements of the show like that would be ruined, because little kids are always more attached to their mothers, at least until a certain age. The show already has Misato and her father to play this relationship, anyway. And besides, I really can't imagine Yui taking Gendo's place as commander of NERV. She just isn't enough of a bitch; she has too much heart to ruin her own sons life for the good of humanity. This could make for an interesting fanfic, if handled right, but the show itself needed the mother/child dynamic to work.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 23, 2008 12:40 pm Legendary copypasta wrote: The secret of Evangelion is that they took super robot pilots and reversed their genders if Rei was male, he'd be the awesomely silent/cool/calm guy. When he rushes that angel with an N2 mine under his arm sacrificing his life ... that is the scene where MANLY TEARS flow for A MAN'S WAY OF LIFE AND DEATH. Asuka, if a man, would be an awesomely HOT BLOODED pilot. And pervy with his advances on Shinji, but a little tsundere. And Shinji, as a weak little girl, as a girl, puts it into context. You'd be fapping furiously to Shinjiko every night because of her shy demeanour And with girl Kaworu, Shinji x Kaworu would be amazingly hot.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Jul 23, 2008 12:43 pm Mr. Tines wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jul 23, 2008 12:44 pm WIN.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Wed Jul 23, 2008 12:46 pm Submit that pic to the caption contest. NOW.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed Jul 23, 2008 12:46 pm oh, my, GOD!! IT ALL MAKES SENSE TO ME NOW! srsly, that could make for one hell of a fanfic (and good LORD would I be all over "Shinjiko")

[]: Re: Random Hypothetical: Gender Bender?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 23, 2008 1:15 pm Gamer_2k4 wrote: FAIL. After seeing that, I'm pretty sure the characters should just stay the genders they already are.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jul 23, 2008 1:30 pm Is it me, or does Asuka look like a blond (red w/e) Kaji in that pic? Anyway, I am definitely going to have to go to the caption thread to laugh my ass off! Also... Is the second one from the foreground supposed to be Kaworu, because if it is he is still a dude....wait....nevermind I get it now. Many apologies for the double post, but I found this.... Forget about actual Kensuke and Toji.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Wed Jul 23, 2008 4:36 pm Damn, Fem-Toji is fine.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Wed Jul 23, 2008 5:10 pm Formless One wrote: And besides, I really can't imagine Yui taking Gendo's place as commander of NERV. She just isn't enough of a bitch; she has too much heart to ruin her own sons life for the good of humanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Jul 23, 2008 5:35 pm Action_Bastard wrote: but I found this....

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 23, 2008 6:47 pm I've got to say, I'm already more fond of this version of Kensuke. Has sort of a 'Inquisitive Yearbook Girl' look going there that works much better than the 'ultrageek' he usually sports. Fem-Toji looks like she's a refugee from Battle Athletes. Mr. Tines wrote: The secret of Evangelion is that they took super robot pilots and reversed their genders

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jul 23, 2008 6:58 pm Well if Shinji was female, she would have looked for love from other people, doing dirty deeds to satisfy herself, if you know what I mean... Probably with male Asuka, since he would be in the vicinity. They probably would not live with male Misato, with the drinking and all, so maybe a dorm type complex would be implemented on the Nerv grounds or owned property. Also.... I have always wondered what I would be like as a chick, I would probably be insanely gorgeous but with morals and smarts at the same time.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Jul 23, 2008 7:09 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Well if Shinji was female, she would have looked for love from other people, doing dirty deeds to satisfy herself, if you know what I mean... Probably with male Asuka, since he would be in the vicinity.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jul 23, 2008 7:21 pm No no no no no, I am not sexist in any way, shape, or form, that is just how it would be...in the show. I am open to other interpretations of what would go on.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Jul 23, 2008 7:23 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Well if Shinji was female, she would have looked for love from other people, doing dirty deeds to satisfy herself, if you know what I mean...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jul 23, 2008 9:29 pm Well then if the genders were switched, then other aspects of the "joy" of adolescence would thus be toughed upon, and rape seems like a good candidate. Don't know who would commit the act, but one of males will have to come to Fem-Shinji rescue following the incident and kick whoever did the raping 's ass. Then that person would be Fem-Shinji's true love interest.

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Wed Jul 23, 2008 9:33 pm Huh?! whats all this about rape?! Man, this thread went weird in a hurry.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Wed Jul 23, 2008 9:45 pm ok ok, changing.........I believe that they all would have gone on that school trip and they all would have fun and such, but would have to cut it short and make a hasty return to fight the angel. There, no more raping, now it can be as happy as leekspin!!! Those crazy Finnish!
